feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Work Zone My Inbox / Task Center: solution to get Open Task to generate a URL accessible through WZ
entry.content:
When the user navigates to "Open Task" and the task is configured to show details in a Web Dynpro ABAP application then the backend system generates a URL pointing to that backend system directly. For a seamless experience, it not only requires that backend to be exposed on the internet (with or without a gateway system), but also requires SAML2 to be setup. It defeats the purpose of Work Zone being the internet facing portal making backend applications accessible via the SAP Cloud Connector.

Is there a solution offered by SAP that allows the Open Task action to lead to a URL that is accessible within Work Zone itself?

Similar question here from a while back, but in the context of the Fiori Launchpad service with no solution: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/fiori-inbox-cloud-default-webgui-wda/qaq-p/12514253

I hope it's supported. If it's not, then I plan to explore enhancing the class that generates the URL and return a link to WZ targetting the Shell-startWDA intent.

entry.title: CAP UI not loading when opening from SAP Build WorkZone
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I have a cap application and UI application(built using annotation) deployed into SAP Build WorkZone.

Below is my UI application(highlighted in green - nsinvoiceui) visible in HTML5 Application section and it is loading properly when I open it from HTML5 Applications section.

However, the same application is not loading when I'm opening it from Build WorkZone. It stays in the below page.

When I checked in the developer tools, below is the error it was showing "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'message')" when loading ShellServices.

Note: This application was working fine yesterday(10-04-2024), surprisingly not today.

since the error is from standard library, I don't know What am I missing here.

I tried updating the Build workzone content, cleared cache and reopening the application. it didn't help me resolve.

Help me to resolve this issue.

Thanks in Advance!!

Best Regards

Boopalan M

SAP Business Application Studio 

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition 

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment 

HTML5 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model  #flexible programming model-UI5

entry.title: How to use deploy CAPM application link in SAP BUILD app.
entry.content: I have created a CAPM application and deployed and generate one URL. I want to know how we can use that url for SAP Build App to connect with PostgreSQL. And also getting error 401, when I want to see data in Postman with the URL.

entry.title: MyInbox in the SAP Build Work Zone lists tasks, but does not display them.
entry.content:
I have subscribet to SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Workzone in the same Subaccount. 

On my Work Zone Site i added the Process Trigger and MyInbox component. The Process Trigger works fine but MyInbox isn't working correctly. It lists the assigend Task of an User on the left menue but nothing happens when i click on them to work on the forms.

I created an Destination on the subaccount für SAP Build Process Automation in preparation for MyInbox on Work Zone.

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Workzone Advanced Edition Administration authentication problem
entry.content:
We recently created a Workzone Advanced service and have a custom IDP. I used to have access to theAdministration Console in a previous system, but while other colleagues can see the Admin console, it does not appear for me unless I click on 'All my Apps / SAP Work Zone where I can see see it, but when I click on it I receive an '

Access denied

You do not have permission to access this resource.'

message. debugging mentions the following in the Netwirk tab:

Request URL:
https://zzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz-1.dws.workzone.ondemand.com/company/admin?
Request Method:
GET
Status Code:
403 Forbidden
Remote Address:
3.70.0.246:443
Referrer Policy:
strict-origin-when-cross-origin
 
I seem to have the relevant authorisations
 
I have a user type of 'Employee' and my Status is Active in Cloud Identity Services for the Application.
I found https://me.sap.com/notes/0003198427 and
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-advanced-edition/sap-build-work-zone-advanced-edition/assign-company-administrators but can't see anything different apart from I have 2 Work Zone Applications in different system assigned to my userid where as my colleagues don't. 
My userid has been removed and reinserted into the CIS but no luck.
 
Any help gratefully received.
 
Regards
Neil

entry.title: IAS User/Group management from multiple Identity Provider for Workzone Application
entry.content:
• We are working with "SAP Cloud Identity Services" and "SAP Build Workzone" application.
  • SAP Build Workzone --> Agent Connection is our target application for all users, which requires user to be present on it's user data-store to drive permissions properly.
  • We have two types of users: Internal and External
  • We need all users to be synced to Workzone, which is setup through IAS Source/Target system.
  • Internal users using Azure Entra to authenticate. Corporate IdP is setup in IAS. SCIM Sync has been established to synchronize users from Azure Entra.
  • External users uses IAS as their authentication service provider. They are on-boarded directly on to IAS.
  • Both of these uses types uses same security Group for the specific application.

Our issue is, Every time we run SCIM Read/Re-sync job, it is removing external users from the IAS security group. Is there a way to limit the SCIM Sync job just work with Internal UserType for the Group assignments?

entry.title: Custom SAP BTP Workzone Maintaince mode
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I've a requirement to enable maintenance mode for the BTP User by period (user will be locked during period) And need to show a custom message to user to inform site is under maintenance

As far as i know for now we don't have maintenance mode for sap btp workzone services it still on idea of SAP
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/295127

So, could u give me advice or do we've other way (instead of custom in UI5 apps)

entry.title: Mashup from SAP Build Not Loading in SAP С4С Mobile App
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We created an application in SAP Build Apps and configured SSO authorization in SAP BTP. Then, we integrated the application into SAP Sales Cloud using an HTML mashup.

During testing on the PC browser, everything worked perfectly. However, when trying to run the application via the SAP C4C mobile app, the mashup does not load. In some cases, the mobile app shows a “domain not trusted” error, despite the URL being correctly added to the trusted domains in BTP.

The configuration appears to be correct, but the mashup isn’t functioning in the mobile version.

Has anyone faced similar issues with mashups in the mobile app? Any suggestions on how to resolve this would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone - Set up Environment
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

I'm trying to successfully onboard to the SAP Build Work Zone (advance edition), but I'm struggeling with the Configurator. Everytime I try to set up the Environment using the default domain tpe, it is saying "Could not set up the environment" (Error Details: createCompany, Forbidden).

In the Settings the IAS and the IPS are already connected and I don't know how to solve this issue. 

Does anyone of you experience the same and know how to fix it?

Thanks a lot in advance!

Br, Marvin

entry.title: how to Dump files in AWS S3 from SAP business Process Automation
entry.content:
I am working on a solution where I need to upload files from SAP Build Process Automation (SAP BPA) to Amazon S3. I have already created a flow to download files from an SAP BPA screen flow, but I am facing issues connecting to S3. SAP BPA does not provide a native way to directly connect to S3, and I am unable to use Basic Authentication via SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI). Is there a way to achieve this integration, or would another approach be necessary

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition SAP Business Workflow  SAP Business Process Automation by Redwood SAP Business Process Management SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Getting issue in running automation
entry.content:
i have already updated the agent's sdk version. I even tried with the same version given still every time getting same issue

 

SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation SAP Workforce Performance Builder, desktop edition# SAP Process Integration

entry.title: Conversion of Json data to xml in build process automation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am new to SAP Build Process Automation. I have a requirement where i need to consume the data using odata service and convert it to the xml format. I am able to get the data using the process and action. Now i need to convert this data fetched from the action and convert to xml. I know we are having the JSON to XML template in the build process automation. But i was strucked on how to pass the data from the action step to convert.Please find the sequence of steps.

Can you please suggest about how to convert the data to xml.
Here I am not able to add the conversion step as it is accessible in automation step only.

Regards
Santosh Vegi.

entry.title: How can I deploy an UI Integration Card to WorkZone through CLI
entry.content:
I created an UI integration card through Business Application Studio. I want to version my project through GitHub and setup a pipeline to automatically deploy it on an Advanced Work Zone instance once we merge.

I already found some build script examples on this repository provided by SAP.

Is there a way for us to deploy the created artifact through CLI so we can automate this process through GitHub Actions or any other type of CI/CD tool?

Thanks in advance for any support!

entry.title: Build Work Zone - Image Widget - Image Resizing
entry.content:
Hello

I am trying to make an image that I have uploaded into the Build Work Zone Image Widget smaller. I would like it thumbnail size, ~100px100p. No matter what I do it always brings in a large image, even when I set the sizing of the .png image size to 100x100 it's still a large distorted image. 

 

Using a TEXT Widget I can paste the image into the text and have full control over the sizing. This does not work however as the image is not saved and will be removed on a refresh. 

I've searched KB articles, help and the community but I haven't found a clear answer. 

How do I get resizing control over images to make the image smaller? Basically make the image smaller then the column size. 

Thanks.

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-advanced-edition/sap-build-work-zone-advanced-edition/image-widget

entry.title: Can you federate content from R3 into BTP workzone?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an existing transaction in an on premise ECC system (with embeded SAP_GWFND component) that we'd want to consume from the BTP Launchpad (SAP Build Workzone, advanced edition).

Is there any way to do this?

We tried creating an app in BTP with UI technology "SAP GUI for HTML" and the transaction code, but it didn't work (just got an internal error message when tried to access the tile within the launchpad).

We also tried federating the content from ECC into BTP workzone content management (as a new content provider), but didn't work either and all the documentation we found for on-prem federation only refers to SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business Suite or SAP Enterprise Portal (nothing for ECC R3, so not sure if this is a viable option).

Any advice or suggestion would be appreciated.

SAP Business Technology Platform SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: How do I hide/override back button in SAP Workzone?
entry.content: I want to preferably override the back button on this page....at worst hide it. I've tried multiple ways but nothing seems to work. Has anyone done this?

entry.title: Change "System" in Work Zone application
entry.content:
Hello,

We've built applications in Work Zone to access ABAP backend functions; we had the need to rename a few Destinations in BTP, which are used in the System drop down when creating these applications.

When doing so the rest of the fields in the Application get reset to default losing all configuration, which basically equals to recreating the Application.

Is there any way to change the target System within an Application without losing the configuration?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to Handle Mass Role "assign site" in workzone
entry.content:
I’m currently provisioning PFCG roles from ERP to BTP IAS and automating role federation through Work Zone content packages.

However, the issue lies in Work Zone itself—it’s not enough to simply provision roles. Each role must be manually assigned to a site using the "ASSIGN SITE" button.

Given that there are over 1,000 roles, manually assigning them via the UI is incredibly challenging, especially since there’s no search functionality for unassigned roles!

Is there any way to automate role assignments, or at least make this process easier? Any suggestions or solutions would be greatly appreciated!

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Planning for the Future: Insights on Transitioning from SAP C4C Sales Service Cloud V1 to V2
entry.content:
As we step into 2025, we are actively planning for the future of our SAP CX landscape and evaluating the transition from C4C V1 to V2. Currently, we have a globally live SAP C4C system with a mix of medium to complex PDI developments.

We are eager to hear from others who have successfully made this shift! Specifically, we’d love to learn about:

  • Your migration journey: How was the process of transitioning from V1 to V2?
  • Required tools and skills: What expertise did your team need? Did you leverage any specific tools or frameworks for the transition?
  • Change management strategies: How did you handle change management, both for development processes and for end-users?

For context, our team has solid experience Technically with : SAP CI (aka CPI), Kyma, and a basic understanding of BAS and CAP and 

Functionally : Lead to Order Processes.

We are looking for holistic insights into the implementation, challenges, and best practices for maintaining and optimizing the system post-migration.

Looking forward to engaging discussions and learning from your experiences!

Best regards,
Dhruvin

entry.title: Can we Create report on wizards completion in SAP WorkZone?
entry.content: Can we Create report on wizards completion in SAP WorkZone?
